title: Roundtable LLM Trailer
description: Validates the LLM trailer format emitted at the end of each LLM turn during roundtable sessions. Three required fields: state, sub_task, status. Plus version (integer, default 1). Trailer format: ---ROUNDTABLE-TRAILER--- / state: X / sub_task: Y / status: Z / version: 1 / ---END-TRAILER---. Traces: FR-003, AC-003-01.

state.description: Current user-facing state name (e.g., CONVERSATION, PRESENTING_REQUIREMENTS, AMENDING, FINALIZING, COMPLETE)

sub_task.description: Active background sub-task ID, or null if no sub-task is active

status.description: Current turn status: running (work in progress), complete (sub-task or state finished), waiting (awaiting user input)

version.description: Trailer schema version for forward compatibility
